home.quote: "Code never sleeps, and neither do I until I reach my goals."
home.p1: I am Randy, a passionate fullStack developer specialized in creating modern and high-performance web and mobile applications. I love exploring new technologies and taking on technical challenges. This means I am capable of leading a project from A to Z, from user interface design to server and database management.
home.p2: In my projects, I regularly use Vue.js and TypeScript to build reactive interfaces, TailwindCSS for modern designs in addition to having a solid background in UX and UI design, and Laravel for the backend. As well as Docker Engine and Docker Compose to containerize and orchestrate my applications. On the mobile side, I am getting familiar with IONIC to develop cross-platform applications. And I also have experience with Python for scripts and automation,
home.p3_1: Feel free to browse my portfolio to discover my projects, skills, and experiences. If you have any questions or would like to collaborate, do not hesitate to

values.innovation_desc: Always at the cutting edge of technology

about.discover_arch: Discover the technical architecture of this portfolio
about.vue_desc: Fine-grained reactivity based on Proxy, better performance and code reuse
about.ci_desc: On every push: typing verified, passing tests, automatic deployment

contact.p: Working with international teams and decision-makers taught me one thing: the best technology doesn't replace a good discussion. Let's talk about your project — without obligation, with seriousness and benevolence.

projects.quote: "Some projects I am particularly proud of"
projects.fid_connect: Fid-Connect is an all-in-one platform that centralizes accounting, tax, and administrative management for businesses. It goes beyond simple task tracking by integrating tax reform management, share tracking, engagement letter generation, key process automation, depreciation, VAT, appointment management, online payment, etc. Developed with Vue.js and Laravel, it is adapted to the requirements of Belgian regulations and optimizes productivity while securing operations.
projects.qcp: QCP is a custom-built application developed for a Belgian client, focusing on credit management, depreciation tracking, and financial planning. Powered by Vue.js and Laravel, it offers an intelligent and intuitive interface that simplifies complex financial operations, automates calculations, and enables seamless generation of essential documents. Designed to meet the client's specific needs, it optimizes financial management and improves decision-making through advanced features and an exceptional user experience.
projects.echo_webline: echo-webLine is a web platform developed for a Paris-based client, specializing in cardiovascular imaging and scientific event management. Designed with Nuxt.js and Laravel, it offers a modern and dynamic interface allowing the presentation of medical content, congress registration management, and highlighting the activities of a professional community. The application emphasizes a fluid user experience, intuitive navigation, and visual highlighting of key information, while ensuring performance and reliability.
projects.afr_fan: Afr-fan is a social network dedicated to the African community, built with Nuxt.js and Laravel. It offers a modern interface facilitating member interactions, interest group creation, and content sharing. The platform aims to strengthen diaspora ties while celebrating African cultural richness, and integrates online payments via VISA or PayPal for premium features.
projects.nurses: Souper of Nurses is a Belgian restaurant that hosts major events over long periods. This website allows users to make online group reservations, contact the restaurant directly, and includes an administration panel to manage registrations, events, and VIP seating. Developed with Vue.js and Symfony, it offers a fluid user experience and efficient reservation management, while highlighting upcoming events and exclusive restaurant services.
projects.infi_swap: InfiSwap directly connects healthcare institutions (hospitals, retirement homes, clinics) with independent or available nurses. Thanks to an intelligent and 100% automated algorithm, the platform fills replacements and temporary assignments in minutes, without any human intermediary. It guarantees nurses better visibility on available missions, transparent compensation, and simplified schedule management. For healthcare institutions, InfiSwap reduces recruitment costs, speeds up the process, and secures assignments.
projects.p_italics: To illustrate this approach concretely, here are a few projects I have worked on. They will show you how dialogue and adapting to the context matter more than technology alone.
projects.toast_click: Click on an image to enlarge it 🙂!
projects.meta_desc: Some projects I am particularly proud of

quality.quote: "Randy as a web and mobile developer"
quality.description: Through the projects I have done alone or with a team, I have understood that technical skills are not enough. What differentiates an effective developer is their mindset. Here are the principles that guide my daily work.
quality.q1_desc: "I believe continuous learning is essential to stay ahead in the ever-evolving world of technology. I always seek to enrich my skills, and my ability to learn quickly allows me to adapt to new tools."
quality.q2_desc: "I approach every challenge with the goal of finding effective and creative solutions rather than letting obstacles hold me back. As far as I am concerned, every problem is an opportunity to innovate and improve, and I enjoy tackling complex situations with a reliable and sustainable strategic approach."
quality.q3_desc: "I have made significant efforts, research, and practice to ensure that every product is accessible on all devices, whether it is a smartphone or a computer. This approach allows us to provide tailored solutions and effectively broaden the target of our projects."
quality.q4_desc: "Minimalism is a design approach that aims to produce a clean, clear, and pleasant-to-use design. This creates a simple yet complete experience that saves time while ensuring high-quality output."
quality.q5_desc: "I am often told that talent alone is not enough to succeed. For me, the essential lies in mutual support, persistence, the will to act, and the efforts made to gain experience. Web development is a form of art and inspiration, where creativity and perseverance make all the difference."
quality.q6_desc: "The most important factor in a company's evolution is team spirit and the quality of relationships between collaborators. It is essential to build strong bonds, collaborate in a good atmosphere, and provide mutual support."
quality.meta_desc: Randy as a web and mobile developer

services.quote: Let's discover together the services I offer to bring your digital projects to life
services.p: Your digital success is my priority. I believe in transparent partnerships, meticulous execution, and delivering solutions that exceed expectations. Together, let's build something remarkable.
services.git_desc: Effective source code management with Git, including teamwork, conflict resolution, and clean branching structures.
services.team_desc: Implementation of efficient workflows for development teams, ensuring clean merges, stable releases, and good coordination between developers.
services.deploy_desc: Web application deployment on Linux servers with secure configuration, access management, and production optimization.
services.custom_desc: I am open to discussing personalized services tailored to your specific needs. Do not hesitate to contact me to talk about it!
services.collab_desc: I am also interested in long-term collaborations or partnerships to develop innovative projects together. Do not hesitate to contact me to discuss!
services.maintenance_desc: In addition to my core skills, I also offer technical consulting, code review, and support services for your digital projects.
services.doc_desc: I translate your needs into clear and detailed specifications. Writing technical specifications, user stories, and technical docs tailored to all stakeholders.
services.pedagogy_desc: I simply explain complex technical concepts. Training, demonstration, and support so you can perfectly master your tools.
services.biz_desc: Business and results-oriented vision. I help you align your project with your business goals and communicate effectively with all stakeholders.
services.meta_desc: Let's discover together the services I offer to bring your digital projects to life

technology.quote: "Now let's explore the technologies I use daily"
technology.description: Being polyvalent doesn't mean knowing a bit of everything, it means knowing how to adapt and choose the right technology for each challenge. Here are the tools I use every day to bring your ideas to life.
technology.toast_hover: Hover over the logo to display the tech name 🙂
technology.meta_desc: Now let's explore the technologies I use daily

skills.quote: "Let's get straight to the point, let's talk about my skills"
skills.description: I believe continuous learning is essential to stay ahead in the ever-evolving world of technology. I always seek to enrich my skills, and my ability to learn quickly allows me to adapt to new tools.
skills.vue_s1_desc: I can create clearly typed components. I can also define solid, secure interfaces. Manage classes and decorators efficiently.
skills.vue_s2_desc: I can build smooth applications without full reloads. The user experience is thus more pleasant and fast.
skills.vue_s3_desc: I can centralize and organize global state management. This simplifies the development of complex and modular projects.
skills.laravel_s1_desc: Manage relations between models, perform complex queries and manipulate data intuitively and efficiently.
skills.laravel_s2_desc: I can define clear routes, secure access with middlewares and organize controller logic.
skills.laravel_s3_desc: I can create dynamic views with Blade and develop robust RESTful APIs for front/back communication.
skills.docker_s1_desc: I can create and manage containers to isolate applications. Allow consistent deployment across all environments.
skills.docker_s2_desc: I can orchestrate multiple containers with Docker Compose. This simplifies the configuration of complex projects.
skills.docker_s3_desc: I can create optimized images and manage data volumes. Persistence and reusability of environments.
skills.ionic_s1_desc: I can create mobile applications that run on Android and iOS. This allows reaching a maximum of users with a single codebase.
skills.ionic_s2_desc: I can integrate IONIC with Vue.js for dynamic interfaces. Provides a reactive and dynamic user experience.
skills.ionic_s3_desc: Use native plugins to access phone features. This allows adding camera, GPS, notifications, etc.
skills.python_s1_desc: I can structure code with classes and objects for modular projects. This facilitates the progressive maintenance and evolution of code.
skills.python_s2_desc: I can write scripts to automate repetitive tasks. This improves efficiency and reduces human errors.
skills.python_s3_desc: I can develop web applications with Flask or Django. Ability to create APIs and web interfaces.
skills.nuxt_s1_desc: I can develop applications with server-side rendering or static generation. This improves SEO and overall performance.
skills.nuxt_s2_desc: I master the auto-import of components, composables, and utilities. The code is cleaner and productivity is increased.
skills.nuxt_s3_desc: I can extend functionalities with Nuxt modules and organize code in layers. Modular and maintainable architecture.
skills.symfony_s1_desc: I can structure robust applications according to the MVC pattern. Clear separation of responsibilities for better maintainability.
skills.symfony_s2_desc: I can manage data persistence with Doctrine. Creation of entities, advanced relationships, and optimized DQL queries.
skills.symfony_s3_desc: I can create complex forms with native validation. Authentication management, voters, and firewalls.
skills.cicd_s1_desc: I can automate tests and code validation on each push. Early detection of errors and guaranteed quality.
skills.cicd_s2_desc: I can set up automated deployment pipelines. Fast and reliable delivery to production environments.
skills.cicd_s3_desc: I can configure custom workflows with main tools. Parallel execution, caches, and multi-environment deployments.
skills.flutter_s1_desc: I can build rich and reactive interfaces with widgets. Declarative approach and flexible composition for customized UIs.
skills.flutter_s2_desc: I can efficiently manage application state. Reactive updating of interfaces and separation of concerns.
skills.flutter_s3_desc: I can develop applications for mobile, web, and desktop. Single codebase for multiple targets with native rendering.
skills.express_s1_desc: I can design and develop robust RESTful APIs with Express. Routing, middlewares, and adapted HTTP responses.
skills.express_s2_desc: I can create custom middlewares for validation, authentication, logging, and error management.
skills.express_s3_desc: I can connect Express to MongoDB, PostgreSQL, or MySQL. Use of ODM/ORM like Mongoose or Sequelize for data operations.

testimonials.quote: "Some testimonials from my clients and employers"
testimonials.description: Having had the opportunity to collaborate with many international clients and senior managers, I have noticed the same requirement everywhere: trust is built on reliability, listening, and the quality of the deliverable. Here is what they wanted to testify.
testimonials.t1_body: "Randy is dynamic, works neatly and professionally. I like collaborating with him and also appreciate him as a developer."
testimonials.t2_body: "There are two things I appreciate about Randy: his ability to adapt quickly and his constant desire to evolve. I am convinced he will go far in the IT field."
testimonials.meta_desc: Some testimonials from my clients and employers

webcup.award_by: The award was presented by Mr. Sylvain, the director of the IT company
webcup.title: WebCup 2024 !
webcup.p1: The WebCup is a web development competition that takes place every year in Madagascar. In 2024, I had the honor of participating in this prestigious event and taking 2nd place.
webcup.p2: During this competition, I was able to put my web development skills into practice, working on concrete projects and collaborating with other talented developers. I also had the opportunity to learn new technologies and take on stimulating technical challenges.
webcup.p3: This experience was extremely enriching for me, both professionally and personally. It allowed me to strengthen my web development skills, develop my team spirit, and discover new perspectives in the field of web development.
webcup.p4: I am proud of this achievement and motivated to continue progressing in my career as a web developer. The WebCup 2024 will remain an important milestone in my professional journey, and I am grateful for the opportunity I was given to participate in this exceptional event.

local.project_fid: 🎯 **Fid-Connect**: An all-in-one accounting and administrative platform (Laravel/Vue.js). It automates Belgian tax processes, amortization, and invoicing. One of his most complex projects!
local.project_qcp: 📊 **QCP**: A credit and amortization management app. Intelligent and intuitive, this project optimizes financial planning through complex automated calculations.
local.project_echo: 🏥 **echo-webLine**: A medical platform specialized in cardiovascular imaging (Nuxt.js/Laravel). Developed for a Paris-based client for scientific congresses.
local.project_afrfan: ⚽ **AFR-Fan**: A social network for the African community (Nuxt/Laravel). Includes an online payment system (VISA/PayPal) and interest groups.
local.project_nurse: 👩‍⚕️ **Nurse**: A management solution for healthcare professionals and event booking (Symfony/Vue.js) for a Belgian establishment.
local.tech_laravel: 🐘 **Laravel**: Randy is a Laravel expert (v8 to v11). He masters Eloquent ORM, REST APIs, security (Sanctum), and performance optimization (Octane/Redis).
local.tech_vue: 💚 **Vue.js / Nuxt.js**: His preferred frontend framework. He uses Composition API, TypeScript, Pinia, and Nuxt for SSR/SEO.
local.tech_docker: 🐳 **Docker**: Daily use of Docker and Docker Compose to containerize applications and ensure stable deployments (CI/CD).
local.tech_mobile: 📱 **Mobile**: Development of hybrid applications with **IONIC** and currently learning **Flutter** for high-performance cross-platform solutions.
local.award_webcup: 🏆 **WebCup 2024**: Randy won **2nd place** in this prestigious web development competition in Madagascar. Proof of his speed and code quality!

• **Custom Development**: Web & Mobile (Laravel, Vue, Nuxt, IONIC).

I can lead a project from A to Z! 🚀

local.ai_nature: I am an AI currently in training. I interact with the Gemini API, and Gemini interacts with the rules Randy has implemented to respond. Please note that Randy uses a free plan for the API, which can sometimes limit my responses; in such cases, I respond using my local training data. I am a real AI, but still learning! 🤖🧠
